phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ginjinha tap is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a torneira da ginjinha?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH too-ruh-NAY-ruh DUH zheen-ZHEE-nyuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Ginjinha is a famous local cherry liqueur, served from a dedicated tap near the payment area.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão para levantar o recibo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN PUH-ruh leh-vahnng-TAHR AW reh-SEE-boo?

likely_response.local: Levante o recibo no mesmo balcão onde pagou.
likely_response.pronunciation: leh-VAHNNG-tih AW reh-SEE-boo NOO MEHZH-moo bahl-KOWN OHNG-dih puh-GOHW.
likely_response.translation_en: Pick up the receipt at the same counter where you paid.

responses.english: Pick up the receipt at the same counter where you paid.
responses.phonetic: leh-VAHNNG-tih AW reh-SEE-boo NOO MEHZH-moo bahl-KOWN OHNG-dih puh-GOHW.
responses.french: Levante o recibo no mesmo balcão onde pagou.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Queijadas de Óbidos are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as queijadas de Óbidos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH kay-ZHAH-duhsh DIH AW-bee-doosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Queijadas de Óbidos are a historic local specialty, typically kept in dedicated glass cases.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, ask at the counter.

responses.english: Good morning, ask at the counter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Queijadas de Óbidos are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as queijadas de Óbidos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH kay-ZHAH-duhsh DIH AW-bee-doosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff direct customers to the dedicated pastry case where these historic tarts are kept fresh.

likely_response.translation_en: Ask the server at the counter.

responses.english: Ask the server at the counter.

likely_response.local: O recibo está na borda do balcão, junto à caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW reh-SEE-boo ehs-TAH NUH BAW-ruh-duh DOO bahl-KOWN, ZHOONNG-too AH KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Where can I pick up the receipt? The receipt is on the counter edge, near the cash register.

responses.english: Where can I pick up the receipt? The receipt is on the counter edge, near the cash register.
responses.phonetic: AW reh-SEE-boo ehs-TAH NUH BAW-ruh-duh DOO bahl-KOWN, ZHOONNG-too AH KEYE-shuh.
responses.french: O recibo está na borda do balcão, junto à caixa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the receipt pickup is
phrases.text_local: Onde devo recolher o meu comprovativo de pagamento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih DEH-voo reh-koo-LYEHR AW MEHOO koomp-roo-vuh-TEE-voo DIH puh-guh-MAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Receipts are placed on a designated ledge to streamline customer flow after payment.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o posto de ginjinha aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW POHSH-too DIH zheen-ZHEE-nyuh uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao balcão, eles podem indicar o posto de ginjinha.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bahl-KOWN, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW POHSH-too DIH zheen-ZHEE-nyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the counter staff, they can show you the ginjinha tap station.

responses.english: Ask the counter staff, they can show you the ginjinha tap station.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bahl-KOWN, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW POHSH-too DIH zheen-ZHEE-nyuh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao balcão, eles podem indicar o posto de ginjinha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the pastéis de nata display is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a montra dos pastéis de nata?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH MOHNGT-ruh DOOSH puhsh-TEHEESH DIH NAH-tuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Pastéis de nata are traditionally displayed in prominent glass cases near the counter for freshness.
